name: io.github.themagictower/loftbox-mcp
description: Email infrastructure for AI agents: mailboxes, domains/DNS, messaging, webhooks, and a human-in-the-loop approval queue — the LoftBox admin plane as MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: LOFTBOX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: LoftBox API key (lb_...). Required. Create one at https://loftbox.net

environmentVariables.name: LOFTBOX_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: LoftBox API base URL. Optional; defaults to https://api.loftbox.net
